/CAL: SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/X: SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT IS DISCHARGED WITH NO CONTEMPT/ACM/WEAP/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANTSHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THERECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEESIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/BWSTAY: 10-12-21/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE, TO SET/DOP/
